description: Production readiness hardening for the K8s/JetBridge Helm chart (deploy/chart): pod securityContexts, NetworkPolicy, PDB, RBAC scoping, graceful shutdown, signing-key mgmt, conn-pool config, ServiceMonitor, health endpoint, observability metrics, alerting rules. Reconciled against current main (telemetry_simplification superseded the tracing tasks; PVC/GCS-Fuse backend removed from the engine) and finished the still-valid slice.
completionCaveats: (1) Plan was 2.5mo stale; reconciled — dropped Phase 2.3 scanner span (conflicts with telemetry_simplification), resolver span (by decision), and Phase 1.8 GCS-Fuse/NFS examples (PVC/GCS-Fuse backend removed from the engine: --kubernetes-artifact-store-claim no longer exists). (2) Phase 2 metric manual-verification is partial: health endpoint verified 200 on a fresh image, but the new OTel metrics aren't exposed on a default /metrics endpoint (need an OTLP/Prometheus-exporter pipeline + a volume op); code is compiled-in and unit-tested. (3) IMPORTANT scope finding: this track hardens deploy/chart (chart 'concourse-jetbridge' v0.1.0), which is what the e2e suites deploy. Production concourse.home does NOT use this chart — it's ArgoCD-managed from the UPSTREAM concourse chart v20.0.1 (concourse-charts.storage.googleapis.com) + home-infra values, running the jetbridge image. So this chart hardening does not affect prod until/unless prod migrates to deploy/chart. (4) Live RBAC drift + chart-default --kubernetes-artifact-store-claim bug are tracked separately (see plan).
